title: ophrys × peloponnesiaca
intro: Ophrys × peloponnesiaca, also known as the Peloponnesian bee orchid, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Ophrys apifera and Ophrys pallida. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Ophrys × peloponnesiaca are believed to include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
